summary: Get all Job Titles belonging to a Group
description: Returns an array of Job Titles assigned to a specific Group.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Returns an array of Job Title objects.

items.description: Schema representing a single Job Title.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Job Title.

group_ids.description: List of Group UUIDs where this Job Title is available.

globally_accessible.description: Controls whether the Job Title is globally available to all current and future Groups.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Job Title. Helps with categorization and visual distinction.

type.description: Specifies the Job Title type. - `hourly` - Hourly wage-based job title. - `salaried` - Fixed salary job title.

hourly_rate.description: Hourly wage rate for the Job Title. Required if type is `hourly`.
